import re

filepath = "/Users/ricneves/Documents/Projetos/imersao-flowgrammers/imersao/src/pages/AgentIA.tsx"

with open\(filepath, "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Show context around openai_api_key occurrences
print\("openai_api_key contexts:"\)
for m in re.finditer\(r'openai_api_key', content\):
    start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-80\)
    end = min\(len\(content\), m.end\(\)+80\)
    print\(f"  -> {repr\(content[start:end]\)}"\)
    print\(\)

# Show context around agent_name occurrences
print\("agent_name contexts:"\)
for m in re.finditer\(r'agent_name', content\):
    start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-80\)
    end = min\(len\(content\), m.end\(\)+80\)
    print\(f"  -> {repr\(content[start:end]\)}"\)
    print\(\)

PYEOF)
